Doorline
User Guide

Field & office · one app

How to use Doorline

Everything your team needs, from the first knock to the signed deal. This guide covers both sides of the app — the manager console and the field rep app. Screens below are the real thing.

Open itdoorline-psi.vercel.app
Sign inUse the email and password your manager set up for you. Works on any phone or laptop — nothing to install.

Getting in

One sign-in, the right app for you

Enter your email and password. Doorline knows your role and opens the correct view — the console for managers and admins, the field app for reps. Managers and reps use the same link.

For managers & admins

PersonnelActivity SheetOffice SheetCampaignsReportsCommissionsDealsBulletinBillingSettings

For field reps

My DayStreet SheetCampaignsFollow-upsMy DealsMy ReportsLeaderboardBulletinProfile

Part 1

The manager & admin console

Signed in as an owner, admin, or manager, you get the left-hand console. Here's each screen and what it's for.

Personnel

Your roster and the home of every person's Rep ID.

  • Add people with + Add person — set their role (Owner, Admin, Manager, Rep, or Viewer) and territory.
  • Every rep has a short Rep ID (e.g. 4E852E). This is the code that ties campaign sign-ups and uploaded reports back to them.
  • Edit changes a person's details, Deactivate frees their seat without deleting history, Remove deletes them.
  • The header shows billable seats and monthly total — owners, admins, managers, and viewers are always free; you only pay for active reps.

Activity Sheet

A day-by-day accountability view of who worked and how hard.

  • Pick a date to see each rep's doors, contacts, and outcomes for that day.
  • Use it to confirm a day's numbers and to coach — it reads straight from what reps logged in the field.

Office Sheet

The live rollup of every rep's Street Sheet in one grid.

  • Each row is a rep; columns tally their dispositions (Not Home, Decision Maker, Deal, and so on) for the selected day.
  • Numbers update as reps knock — no need to ask for end-of-day totals.

Campaigns

Run a promo and give each closer a personal enrollment link.

  • Create a campaign (product, offer, commission) and Doorline generates a personal enrollment link and Rep ID for every rep.
  • Sign-ups that come through a rep's link are tied to that rep automatically — so credit and commission follow whoever knocked.
  • Set the commission as flat dollars or a percentage; it flows into the Commissions page.

Reports

Upload one master report and split it by rep automatically.

  • Drop in a CSV export. Pick the column that holds the Rep ID (or agent code / email / name) and Doorline matches every row to a person.
  • Anything it can't match is listed so you can assign it by hand.
  • Publish to reps sends each person just their own rows — they see them under My Reports in their app, tied to their Rep ID.
  • You can download any rep's slice as its own CSV.

Commissions

See exactly what each rep is owed — no spreadsheets.

  • Every deal's commission is calculated from its campaign's rule (flat or percentage) and rolled up per rep.
  • Click a rep to see the deal-by-deal breakdown behind their total.
  • This tracks what's owed — it doesn't move money — so it's a clean record for payday.

Deals

Every sale across the team, by product and value.

  • A deal is created whenever a rep marks D (Deal) on a door or logs one directly.
  • Filter and review contract value, product, and the customer — including the on-screen signature captured at the door.

Bulletin

Broadcast the day's target or a shout-out to the whole team.

  • Post a message and it lands on every rep's Bulletin the next time they open the app.
  • Good for daily goals, weather calls, and recognition.

Billing

Your plan and seat count at a glance.

  • Shows active billable seats and your monthly total.
  • Deactivating a rep on Personnel immediately drops the seat here.

Settings

Company name, logo, products, and defaults.

  • Set your company name and logo — they replace the Doorline branding across the app and the sign-in screen.
  • Manage your product list — these are the options reps pick from when they log a deal.
  • Set the home ZIP so the map opens on your area.
Two more admin screens use the live map: Team Map shows every door and rep across the org in real time, and Territories lets you draw a zone (or drop a ZIP), assign it to a rep, and schedule it. They need a live connection to load the map, so they're not pictured here — open them from the left menu.

Part 2

The field rep app

On a phone the menu sits across the top. Reps only ever see their own work. The Street Sheet is the one to learn first.

My Day

Your home screen — today's plan and numbers.

  • Opens on today with your doors, deals, and follow-ups due.
  • Everything here is just yours.

Street Sheet

The clipboard, digitized — your main tool at the door.

  • Work top to bottom. On each slot, tap a disposition and it counts as a knock. The tiles up top total your day live: Doors, Decision makers, Deals, Not interested, and Not qualified.
  • The codes: NH Not Home · RL Reloop · DM Decision Maker · B/ID Bill or ID · D Deal · NI Not Interested · NQ Not Qualified · CB Call Back.
  • Marking D creates a deal in My Deals. A product picker appears so you can say what you sold.
  • Swipe the grid sideways to reach Customer, Phone, Comments, and Call Back — type the customer's details there.
  • Tap Complete day when you're done. Tomorrow starts a fresh sheet on its own.
Good to know

Type freely even on weak signal — every entry is saved on your phone and syncs when you're back in range. If you see “Syncing…” up top, just don't close the app until it clears.

Campaigns

Your enrollment link and Rep ID for each promo.

  • Each active campaign shows your personal link — share it and any sign-up is credited to you.
  • Your Rep ID is here too; it's what ties reports and commissions back to you.

Follow-ups

Every callback and “come back later” in one list.

  • Doors you marked for a callback show here with their time.
  • Clear them as you circle back.

My Deals

Your sales and what they're worth.

  • Every deal you've closed, with product, value, and customer.
  • Deals you mark on the Street Sheet land here automatically.

My Reports

Just your rows from any report your manager shares.

  • When a manager publishes a master report, your slice appears here — only your rows, tied to your Rep ID.
  • Download your own numbers as a CSV any time.

Leaderboard

Where you stand with the team.

  • Ranks the team by revenue and close rate, updated automatically.
  • A little friendly competition.

Bulletin

Messages from the office.

  • Daily targets, shout-outs, and announcements from your manager show up here.

Profile

Your details and preferences.

  • Update your info, set your time zone, and manage location-tracking consent.
Reps also have Map / Doors: a live map to drop and work doors by location. It needs a connection to load, so it isn't pictured — it's the second item in the top menu.
Doorline

Questions or something not working the way this guide describes? Tell your admin — the app updates live, so fixes reach every device without an install.
